description: Service interface pattern: IPersistenceService defines abstract interface with FileSystemPersistence and NullPersistence implementations. IAuthService should follow same pattern.
relevantCode: export interface IPersistenceService { saveCollection, loadCollection, saveEntity, loadEntity }
recommendation: Create IAuthService interface with signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange methods. Implement SupabaseAuthService and MockAuthService.
